type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Particulate matter emissions reported for the year 2011 have increased significantly relative to the 2010 reporting year.  This is due to significant increase in road dust emissions from the vehicle kilometres travelled in 2011 relative to the 2010 reporting year.  Fugitive and aggregate handling emissions have increased slighlty in 2011 reporting year.  Both fugitive and handling emissions have minor effects on the total reported contaminants’ release.  The reported releases of VOC were similar between 2011 and 2010 (<10% change).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
